text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower offers me a New Year's greeting as
we begin our first meeting of the year.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
This marks the start of my classic year. I'm sure
there's plenty of races you want me to take on,
right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'll work my hardest to bring a smile to your face!
Let's make this year a great one!
choice_data_list: You took the words right out of my mouth!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower's smile is dazzling. As I think about
how this year is shaping up to be as peaceful as
the last one, I ask her a question.
choice_data_list: Have you decided on a goal for this year?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I have!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: My goal this year is to grow big and tall!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Mm-hmm!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You see, I had my height measured during my
health checkup the other day...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I thought that with my training in full swing and
the fact that I'm eating more than I used to, I'd
have grown a little taller.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But... I haven't changed at all. I'm not even a
single millimeter taller...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want to grow bigger as fast as
possible!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Urgh... I know you're right, but still...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The older students here are all so elegant. Seeing
them every day just makes me wish I was the
same.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get where she's coming from, but this is one
problem that can't be solved through sheer will.
How should I encourage her to think positively?
choice_data_list: Do you want to go jumping?
Let's go ask a tall student for advice!
Let's study methods for growing taller.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Jumping?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wow! Everyone's bouncing on trampolines!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: They look like they're having so much fun...
choice_data_list: Go on, feel free to join them.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But everyone here is smaller than me... Wouldn't I
just get in their way?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey Flower! Are you here for the trampolines,
too?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Mayano!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is Mayano Top Gun. She's one of Nishino
Flower's classmates, and they apparently often
eat lunch together.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I love it here! If you time your jumps with
everyone, you can fly waaay up high! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And the more of us there are, the funner it is!
C'mon, Flower! You're cleared for takeoff!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: O-okay!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoooa! I'm so high up, Mayano!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! ☆ You're flying up above your trainer's
head, Flower!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ah! You're right! Hehe! ♪ I guess I grew up pretty
quickly!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...A tall student?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bubble, bubble...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I see. So you want to grow big quickly. Is that the
gist of it, Flower? ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We talk with Hishi Akebono. Her heart is just as
big as her towering frame is tall, and she and
Nishino Flower get along great.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, I do, but...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: What's in that pot?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Chanko! I used to eat this all the time when I was
growing up!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if it works the same way for
everyone, but this stew is surely the reason I'm so
tall.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
So dig in, Flower! Eat up, and you'll grow big and
strong!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: You mean... you made this for me?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much! I'd love some!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Phwooo. It's nice and warm. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I really do feel like eating this will make me grow
bigger somehow!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That's great! ☆ I've still got plenty of room to
grow, too, so let's get bigger together!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sure!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Have some more! I made three more pots' worth,
so eat up! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank y—wait, you what?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Great idea! Yeah, we should study up.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I think I know just the right person who can
help!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
These are the books in my possession that include
specialized methods of increasing one's height.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
All are based on verified factual information. I'm
certain you'll find something that can be of use to
you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Tachyon!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: What is it?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ah, no... It's just...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking that maybe I could... take part in
one of your experiments.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: That is quite an enticing offer. However...
choice_data_list: Uh, let's get these books back to my office!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It seems your trainer is opposed to the notion.
And besides, such an experiment offers no merit
for me. Not at this time, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Go read those books and learn all you can. I'm
sure you'll be able to grasp something that will
serve you in the future. Farewell, then.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Tachyon is so cool. If I study really hard, then...
choice_data_list: You might end up like her, huh?
You might end up like her, huh?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yeah! So I'll do my best!
